title: Submons Classic Paintings
description: Replaces all Minecraft images with classic artwork.
body:
Replaces all Minecraft images with mostly European classic artwork.

For example are there:

- Albrecht Dürer
- Edvard Munch
- Vincent van Gogh
- Johann Heinrich Füssli
- James McNeill Whistler
- Salvador Dalí
- Rembrandt van Rijn

and many more...

Note: I am NOT the copyright owner of the images used.
